subcodes.first_line: The human reality, from the standpoint of its essential unity and spiritual affinity, is a manifestation of effulgent oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حقیقت انسانیه از حیثیت وحدت اصلیه و الفت روحیه مظهر واحدیت فائضه‌ئیست
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @love of God, @the power of words; of speech, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
